title: Carmell's Create Compilation
description: A collection of add-ons for the Create mod alongside Estrogen, Traveler's Backpack, and backports of The Copper Age and The Pale Garden.
body:
Carmell's Create Compilation brings together Create, a cavalcade of add-ons that will be listed further on, Traveler's Backpacks, backports of the Copper Age and the Pale Garden drops, and the ever beloved shark from ikea Blahaj.

Create add-ons:
Liquid Fuel- allows for the piping of resources into blaze burners
Mechanical Companion- parts of a robotic wolf can be found in structures
Ore Excavation- craft drilling platforms to harvest resources
Aquatic Ambitions- adds an interaction between active conduits and encased fans similar to bulk washing or haunting
Enchantable Machinery- adds the ability to enchant certain create components like drills
Estrogen- adds a way to make estrogen pills, patches, and more interesting items
Garnished and its optional Additions mod- adds nuts which can function as fuel for yourself or your blaze burner, ways to dress those nuts with different flavors, and more
Interiors- Furniture!
Ornithopter Glider- adds a glider that is crafted using ground up elytra that can do a mid-air boost to keep you elevated for longer without firework rockets
Structures Arise- adds a slew of new structures involving create components
Vibrant Vaults- lets you dye vaults, frogports, and may other storage components from create
